title: Developer Advocate
description: Block is seeking a Developer Advocate to engage with our developer community and amplify adoption of our APIs and services. You'll create content, conduct outreach, and support developers building with Block. Work remotely for the fintech company creating financial services for creators and sellers.
responsibilities: Create technical content including blog posts, tutorials, and documentation
Engage with developers through community events, webinars, and social channels
Gather developer feedback and communicate needs to product teams
Build sample applications and code examples showcasing API capabilities
Support developer onboarding and provide technical guidance

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field
